title: Telecommunications firm failed to obtain appropriate consent for voiceprint authentication program
summary: The complainant, a customer of Rogers Communications Inc. (“Rogers”), alleged that Rogers had improperly enrolled her in its voiceprint-based biometric authentication program, Voice ID . The complainant claims that when asked by a customer service representative (“ CSR ”), she declined to consent but was still enrolled into the program. T...
dedupKey: telecommunications firm failed to obtain appropriate consent for voiceprint authentication program|2022-03-30
